response.justification: Bogdan is an excellent generalist software engineer with 13+ years of experience and strong TypeScript and AWS cloud skills, but this role requires specialized AI/GenAI expertise with 8+ years of demonstrated production AI development. His background is primarily in general software development, data integration, and microservices architecture. While his current role mentions AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generation (started April 2025), this is too recent to satisfy the 8-year minimum AI requirement. Critical technical gaps include no demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM performance optimization, Python, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph or CrewAI—all essential for the Staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and AWS cloud platform expertise with hands-on experience in modern infrastructure (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Proven staff-level seniority and ability to work full-stack across diverse technical domains and languages
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, agentic workflows, and MCP code generation shows awareness of current GenAI ecosystem
concerns: Only ~1 month of demonstrated AI/GenAI work versus 8-year requirement; 13-year career focused on general software development, not specialized AI solutions
No evidence of expertise in critical AI stack: vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM performance metrics, or frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
No Python experience listed despite being a primary AI development language; resume emphasizes legacy languages (D, PHP) over modern AI tooling
